economic_notes: Band has government business enterprises including Tano T'enneh Limited Partnership (99.99%), Tano T'enneh General Partner Corporation (100%), Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation (100%), and FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership (0.06%). GBEs not audited, resulting in qualified opinion. Tano Fuel Ltd. (100% owned by Tano T'enneh GP) has advances receivable repayable at $10,000/month at 3.3% maturing July 2032. Band has $400,000 demand facility and $5,000,000 revolving facility, unused at year end.
notes: Audit qualified due to unaudited GBE financial information for Tano T'enneh LP, Tano T'enneh GP, Lheit Lit'en Development Corporation, and FN (PTP) Group LP. Prior year comparative figures restated (Note 21) due to adjustment to income from GBEs of $274,627 increasing investment in GBEs and accumulated surplus. Prior year 2020 statements were audited by a different auditor (unmodified opinion dated December 10, 2020). No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. OSR calculation includes Band Generated revenue, interest and other income, donations, income from GBEs, transfer from deferred revenue, and net administration fee/transfer to deferred revenue adjustments. Accumulated surplus in Note 15 shows $44,478,202 which differs from statement total of $43,268,267 - likely a note error. Long-term debt includes CMHC-secured mortgages and a forgivable HASI loan of $9,450.
